case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. VS. YEE LING LAU

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT JUDGMENT OF DEC-10-2002 SET ASIDE
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT.
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, YEE LING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
